docs.title: 品牌模块图片配置说明
概述
docs.text:
已为您的文档网站添加了完整的品牌模块展示功能。品牌模块包括：

  1. 主页品牌展示 - 在首页展示3个产品线
  2. 产品页面 - 详细的品牌和产品分类
  3. 手册页面 - 产品分类和搜索指南

docs.title: 📂 所需图片文件
docs.text: 请在 docs/assets/images/ 目录下添加以下图片文件：

docs.title: 必需图片
docs.text:
docs/assets/images/
├── brand-premium.png      # Premium Series 品牌标志（推荐 200x200px）
├── brand-standard.png     # Standard Series 品牌标志（推荐 200x200px）
└── brand-value.png        # Value Series 品牌标志（推荐 200x200px）

docs.title: 图片建议规格
docs.text:
• 格式: PNG、JPG 或 WebP
  • 尺寸: 200x200px 至 400x400px
  • 大小: 每个文件建议不超过 100KB
  • 背景: 支持透明背景 (PNG)

docs.title: 1. 主页品牌展示
docs.text: 文件: docs/index.md 位置: Hero 部分下方 展示方式: 3列表格，包含图片和链接

docs.title: 2. 产品页面品牌模块
docs.text: 文件: docs/Products/index.md 位置: 页面顶部 展示方式: - Markdown 网格卡片（带链接和描述） - 每个品牌线包含功能列表

docs.title: 3. 手册页面
docs.text: 文件: docs/manuals/index.md 位置: 页面内容 展示方式: 分类卡片网格

docs.title: 修改图片路径
docs.text:
在 Markdown 中，通过以下方式引用图片：

![Premium Brand](../assets/images/brand-premium.png){ width="200" }

docs.title: 添加更多品牌线
docs.text:
在 docs/Products/index.md 中添加新的品牌部分：

-   <div class="goldse-card" markdown>
    ![Custom Brand](../assets/images/brand-custom.png){ width="200" }

    ### Custom Series
    Your product description here.

    [Learn More →](link)
    </div>

docs.title: 自定义样式
docs.text:
所有品牌模块的样式定义在： 

docs/stylesheets/custom.css

关键类名： - .brands-showcase - 主页品牌展示 - .brands-grid - 产品页品牌网格 - .goldse-card - 品牌卡片

docs.title: 📱 响应式设计
docs.text: 品牌模块已优化为响应式设计： - 桌面端: 3列布局 - 平板端: 2列布局 - 手机端: 1列布局

docs.title: 🚀 构建和预览
docs.text:
构建网站以查看品牌模块效果：

# 进入项目目录
cd c:\Users\Administrator\goldsea-manual\goldsea-manual

# 安装依赖（如需）
pip install -r requirements.txt

# 构建站点
mkdocs build

# 本地预览
mkdocs serve

访问 http://localhost:8000 查看结果。

docs.title: 📝 文件清单
docs.text:
已创建/更新的文件：

  • ✅ docs/index.md - 添加品牌展示模块
  • ✅ docs/Products/index.md - 新建产品页面
  • ✅ docs/manuals/index.md - 新建手册页面
  • ✅ docs/stylesheets/custom.css - 新增品牌样式

docs.title: 💡 最佳实践
docs.text:
1. 图片优化: 在上传前用图片编辑工具压缩图片
  2. 命名规范: 使用小写字母和连字符命名图片
  3. 替代文本: 始终为图片提供有意义的 alt 文本
  4. 一致性: 保持所有品牌图片的风格和尺寸一致
  5. 更新: 定期更新产品表格中的版本号和日期

docs.title: 图片不显示
docs.text:
• 检查文件名是否与 Markdown 中的引用完全匹配（区分大小写）
  • 确保图片文件在正确的目录: docs/assets/images/
  • 验证图片格式是否被支持

docs.title: 样式未应用
docs.text:
• 清除浏览器缓存
  • 重新构建网站: mkdocs build
  • 检查 CSS 文件是否被正确加载

更新时间: 2026-04-30 配置版本: 1.0

docs.title: About Goldse
docs.text: Goldse provides clear product information, practical documentation, and support resources for professional tools and equipment.

docs.title: Our Focus
docs.text: We help customers understand products quickly through organized manuals, concise product pages, and accessible support channels.

docs.title: What We Provide
docs.text:
• Product Information

    Clear product categories, feature summaries, and usage guidance.

  • Documentation

    Manuals, installation guides, maintenance notes, and troubleshooting resources.

  • Support Access

    A simple way for customers to reach the team for questions and service needs.

docs.title: Brand Values
docs.text:
• Clear and practical guidance
  • Reliable product information
  • Consistent support experience
  • Easy access across desktop and mobile devices

docs.title: Contact Us
docs.text: Have a product question, documentation request, or support need? Contact the Goldse team and we will help you find the right information.

docs.title: Support Topics
docs.text:
• Product Questions

    Ask about product features, specifications, or compatibility.

  • Manual Requests

    Request installation guides, user manuals, or technical documents.

  • Service Support

    Get help with troubleshooting, maintenance, and warranty-related questions.

docs.title: Contact Information
docs.text:
Please prepare your product model, purchase channel, and a brief description of your question before contacting support.

Email: support@goldseatool.com

docs.title: Our Products
docs.text: Discover the complete range of Goldse professional products and equipment.

docs.title: Premium Line
docs.text:
Goldse Professional Series

High-end professional equipment designed for demanding applications.

  • Industrial-grade components
  • Extended warranty support
  • Premium documentation

docs.title: Standard Line
docs.text:
Goldse Standard Series

Reliable and cost-effective solutions for everyday needs.

  • Proven reliability
  • Comprehensive guides
  • Worldwide support

docs.title: Value Line
docs.text:
Goldse Value Series

Affordable options without compromising on quality.

  • Budget-friendly pricing
  • Essential features
  • Quick setup guides

docs.title: 📂 Product Categories
docs.text:
• ⚡ Electronic Devices

    Smart electronic tools and advanced control systems. Perfect for technical professionals seeking cutting-edge solutions.

    View Manuals →

    View Manuals →

    View Manuals →

  • 🛠️ Support & Documentation

docs.title: 🌍 Global Distribution
docs.text: Goldse products are available through authorized distributors worldwide. Find support in your region through our Contact Us page.

docs.title: Product Manuals & DocumentationComplete Product Documentation
docs.text:
Your one-stop resource for all Goldse product guides, specifications, and support information

Browse and search through comprehensive manuals for all Goldse products.

docs.title: 🔍 Quick Access
docs.text:
• Search Manuals

    Use the search function at the top to find specific product documentation instantly.

    :simple-magnifyingglass: Search Now

    Explore our complete library organized by product type and function.

    View Categories

    What's New

    Can't find what you're looking for? Contact our support team.

    Get Help

docs.title: 📚 Product Manuals by Category
docs.text:
• ⚡ Electronic Devices

    Comprehensive guides for all Goldse electronic products and smart devices.

    • Setup instructions
    • Technical specifications
    • Troubleshooting guides
    • Safety information

  • ⚙️ Hardware & Appliances

    Detailed manuals for industrial equipment and household appliances.

    • Installation procedures
    • Operation manuals
    • Maintenance schedules
    • Parts diagrams

  • 🔌 Accessories & Parts

    Documentation for all replacement parts and accessories.

    • Compatibility guides
    • Installation tips
    • Warranty information
    • Ordering information

  • 🎯 Getting Started

    Quick start guides and frequently asked questions.

    • First-time setup
    • Common questions

docs.title: 💡 Featured Resources
docs.text:
• Installation Guides

    Step-by-step instructions for setting up your Goldse products correctly and safely.

  • Troubleshooting

    Solutions to common issues and problems with detailed diagnostic steps.

  • Safety Information

    Important safety guidelines and warnings for all product categories.

  • Video Tutorials

    Visual guides to help you get the most out of your Goldse devices.

  • Warranty & Support

    Information about warranty coverage and how to contact our support team.

  • Downloads & Updates

    Firmware updates, drivers, and additional resources for your products.

docs.title: 📞 Need More Help?
docs.text: Can't find the manual you're looking for? Contact us or visit our support page for additional assistance. - Tips & tricks - Video tutorials (coming soon)

docs.title: 📋 All Manuals
docs.text: Product Category Version Updated Goldse Professional Series Electronics 2.0 2024 Goldse Standard Series Hardware 1.5 2024 Goldse Value Series Accessories 1.0 2024

docs.title: 💡 Tips for Using These Manuals
docs.text:
• Use Ctrl+F to search within any page
  • Check the table of contents on the right for navigation
  • Download PDFs are available for offline reading
  • Report issues via our Contact Us page
